RestoringFunctionality_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "47ED82E643AFB1B0BC655C8C82BB19B2", "Certain objects in the world require <Important>specific items</> to be present in their <Important>Inventory</> in order to function.

Items required to restore functionality are shown in the <Important>Inventory</> of the object as <Important>greyed-out icons with a border</>.

You will need to <Important>find</> or <Important>craft</> these items and <Important>deposit</> them within the object to <Important>restore functionality</>.

In the case of this <Important>elevator</>, acquiring a <Item>Power Cell</> and adding it to the <Important>Inventory</> of the elevator will restore power and allow you to <Important>quickly ascend or descend from this location</>.")
